Package com.rays.service

Class UserServiceImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseServiceImpl<UserDTO,​UserDAOInt>
      • com.rays.service.UserServiceImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BaseServiceInt<UserDTO>, UserServiceInt
    @Service
@Transactional
public class UserServiceImpl
extends BaseServiceImpl<UserDTO,​UserDAOInt>
implements UserServiceInt
    UserServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the User entity. This class extends BaseServiceImpl and implements UserServiceInt to provide business operations for UserDTO objects.

    This service handles user-related business logic such as authentication, registration, password management, and user profile operations. It inherits standard CRUD and search operations from BaseServiceImpl and adds user-specific business logic.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String password)
      Authenticates a user based on login ID and password.
      UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String oldPassword, java.lang.String newPassword, UserContext userContext)
      Changes the password for a user after validating the old password.
      UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String login, UserContext userContext)
      Finds a user by their login ID.
      UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
      Handles forgot password functionality.
      UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Registers a new user in the system.

    • Method Detail

      • findByLoginId

        @Transactional(readOnly=true)
public UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String login,
                             UserContext userContext)
        Finds a user by their login ID.
        Specified by:
        findByLoginId in interface UserServiceInt
        Parameters:
        login - the login ID to search for
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the UserDTO if found, or null if no user exists with the given login ID

      • register

        public UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto,
                        UserContext userContext)
        Registers a new user in the system.
        Specified by:
        register in interface UserServiceInt
        Parameters:
        dto - the UserDTO containing user details
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the registered UserDTO with the generated ID

      • authenticate

        public UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId,
                            java.lang.String password)
        Authenticates a user based on login ID and password. Updates the last login timestamp and resets unsuccessful login attempts upon successful authentication. Increments unsuccessful login attempts on failure.
        Specified by:
        authenticate in interface UserServiceInt
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID of the user
        password - the password to validate
        Returns:
        the authenticated UserDTO if credentials are valid, or null otherwise

      • forgotPassword

        public UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
        Handles forgot password functionality. Retrieves the user by login ID for password recovery.
        Specified by:
        forgotPassword in interface UserServiceInt
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID of the user
        Returns:
        the UserDTO if found, or null if no user exists with the given login ID

      • changePassword

        public UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId,
                              java.lang.String oldPassword,
                              java.lang.String newPassword,
                              UserContext userContext)
        Changes the password for a user after validating the old password.
        Specified by:
        changePassword in interface UserServiceInt
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID of the user
        oldPassword - the current password for verification
        newPassword - the new password to set
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the updated UserDTO if password change is successful, or null if old password is invalid
